tools.name: robinhood_api_map_summary
tools.title: Robinhood API Map Summary
tools.description: Summarize the bundled official Crypto OpenAPI and brokerage/account seed route map.

tools.name: robinhood_brokerage_routes
tools.title: Robinhood Brokerage Routes
tools.description: List reverse-engineered brokerage/account seed routes with optional risk/category/host/query filters. This does not make live calls.

tools.name: robinhood_browser_routes
tools.title: Robinhood Browser Routes
tools.description: List latest sanitized authenticated CDP route templates from Robinhood ticker/account pages.

tools.name: robinhood_brokerage_plan
tools.title: Robinhood Brokerage Request Plan
tools.description: Create a dry-run request plan for a mapped brokerage/account route. This does not execute the request.

tools.name: robinhood_brokerage_execute
tools.title: Robinhood Brokerage Execute
tools.description: Execute a personal live Robinhood brokerage/account request using caller-owned auth env. Pass dryRun=true to avoid sending.

tools.name: robinhood_crypto_routes
tools.title: Robinhood Crypto Routes
tools.description: List official Robinhood Crypto OpenAPI paths and methods.

tools.name: robinhood_crypto_sign
tools.title: Robinhood Crypto Sign
tools.description: Generate official Robinhood Crypto API auth headers without sending a request.

content.text:
{
  "ok": true,
  "status": 0,
  "statusText": "DRY_RUN",
  "method": "POST",
  "url": "https://api.robinhood.com/goku/lcm",
  "risk": "write-safe",
  "mutatesAccount": false,
  "requiresAuth": true,
  "contentType": "application/json",
  "body": "{
  "url": "https://api.robinhood.com/goku/lcm",
  "method": "POST",
  "risk": "write-safe",
  "host": "api.robinhood.com",
  "categories": [
    "telemetry-config"
  ],
  "missingParams": [],
  "warnings": [
    "Non-account-state write route such as telemetry or acknowledgement. Use --dry-run for tests."
  ],
  "command": "curl -sS -X POST \"https://api.robinhood.com/goku/lcm\" -H \"Authorization: Bearer $ROBINHOOD_BROKERAGE_TOKEN\"",
  "mode": "dry_run",
  "mutatesAccount": false,
  "requiresAuth": true
}",
  "truncated": false
}
